title: [skip-ci] Packit: set fedora-all after F40 EOL

comments.body: Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.

> Should fedora_copr_test_targets also be updated?

good catch, yes. Will update.
Are there docs for what these mean... somewhere?

> Are there docs for what these mean... somewhere?

1. [Packit docs - Aliases](https://packit.dev/docs/configuration#aliases)
2. There's `python3-fedora-distro-aliases` package which provides `resolve-fedora-aliases`
```
$ resolve-fedora-aliases fedora-all
fedora-41 fedora-42 fedora-rawhide
```

Let me know if you'd like this mentioned in the packit config.
That'd be helpful.  Do we reuse most of these named lists of targets somewhere else in the configuration?

> That'd be helpful. 

Sure, I'll update.

> Do we reuse most of these named lists of targets somewhere else in the configuration?

There may be reuse with yaml anchors in cases where the test targets can be exactly the same as build targets. But that currently ain't the case given we're not testing on aarch64 here. The reuse will be limited to `.packit.yaml`.
Done. Added another commit to cleanup unused yaml anchors and redundant test target.
